query:
-- Create users table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `users` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `openId` varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `name` text,
  `email` varchar(320),
  `loginMethod` varchar(64),
  `role` enum('user','admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastSignedIn` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `openId_idx` (`openId`),
  KEY `email_idx` (`email`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create codes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `codes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `code` varchar(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `parentCodeId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `code_idx` (`code`),
  KEY `parentCodeId_idx` (`parentCodeId`),
  CONSTRAINT `codes_parentCodeId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`parentCodeId`) REFERENCES `codes` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create codeBranches table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `codeBranches` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `parentCodeId` int NOT NULL,
  `branchCode` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `branchDescription` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `branchCode_idx` (`branchCode`),
  KEY `codeBranches_parentCodeId_idx` (`parentCodeId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_branch` (`parentCodeId`, `branchCode`),
  CONSTRAINT `codeBranches_parentCodeId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`parentCodeId`) REFERENCES `codes` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create medications table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medications` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `scientificName` text NOT NULL,
  `coverageStatus` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COVERED',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `scientificName_idx` (`scientificName`(255)),
  KEY `coverageStatus_idx` (`coverageStatus`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create medicationTradeNames table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medicationTradeNames` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `medicationId` int NOT NULL,
  `tradeName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `medicationId_idx` (`medicationId`),
  KEY `tradeName_idx` (`tradeName`),
  CONSTRAINT `medicationTradeNames_medicationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`medicationId`) REFERENCES `medications` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create medicationIndications table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medicationIndications` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `medicationId` int NOT NULL,
  `indication` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `medicationId_idx` (`medicationId`),
  CONSTRAINT `medicationIndications_medicationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`medicationId`) REFERENCES `medications` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create medicationCodes table (junction table)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medicationCodes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `medicationId` int NOT NULL,
  `codeId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `medicationId_idx` (`medicationId`),
  KEY `codeId_idx` (`codeId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_med_code` (`medicationId`, `codeId`),
  CONSTRAINT `medicationCodes_medicationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`medicationId`) REFERENCES `medications` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `medicationCodes_codeId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`codeId`) REFERENCES `codes` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create conditions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conditions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `description` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `name_idx` (`name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create conditionCodes table (junction table)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conditionCodes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `conditionId` int NOT NULL,
  `codeId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `conditionId_idx` (`conditionId`),
  KEY `codeId_idx` (`codeId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_cond_code` (`conditionId`, `codeId`),
  CONSTRAINT `conditionCodes_conditionId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`conditionId`) REFERENCES `conditions` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `conditionCodes_codeId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`codeId`) REFERENCES `codes` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create conditionMedications table (junction table)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `conditionMedications` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `conditionId` int NOT NULL,
  `medicationId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `conditionId_idx` (`conditionId`),
  KEY `medicationId_idx` (`medicationId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_cond_med` (`conditionId`, `medicationId`),
  CONSTRAINT `conditionMedications_conditionId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`conditionId`) REFERENCES `conditions` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `conditionMedications_medicationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`medicationId`) REFERENCES `medications` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create nonCoveredCodes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `nonCoveredCodes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `code` varchar(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `description` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `code_idx` (`code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create searchAnalytics table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `searchAnalytics` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `query` text NOT NULL,
  `resultsCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `responseTime` int DEFAULT 0,
  `userId` int,
  `timestamp` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `userId_idx` (`userId`),
  KEY `timestamp_idx` (`timestamp`),
  CONSTRAINT `searchAnalytics_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Create userSessions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `userSessions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `sessionStart` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `sessionEnd` timestamp,
  `isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
  KEY `userId_idx` (`userId`),
  KEY `sessionStart_idx` (`sessionStart`),
  CONSTRAINT `userSessions_userId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
